titles.english: Guilty Hole ～ Room of Guilty Pleasure
synonyms: ギルティホール ～教え子しか指名できない店
Guilty Hole: Oshiego Shika Shimei Dekinai Mise

description:
"Please pick your favorite student..." The thing that appeared before the overworked teacher, Mr. Sasaki, was “Guilty Pleasure.” He thinks he's having a dream when he sees the student's shoe lockers have been transformed into selection panels... seeing one that catches his eye, he joking picks her... When she appears in his classroom in the middle of the night, throwing insults at him, but her eyes seem to linger on him, tinged with embarassment. "I'll finish this quickly so... Don't hold back, ok...?" Thus begins a forbidden relationship... Welcome to Guilty Pleasure, where anything is allowed--

(OceanVeil)

Note: Episode 1 received an advances distribution on AnimeFesta on September 12th, 2025. The start date reflects the start of the regular series broadcasting.
